Canada–Brazil Trade Report

2024–2025 Performance & 6‑Month Outlook

Cristiane Giacomazzi, Flavia Batista, Julio Carneiro

March 19, 2026

Executive Summary

CANADA-BRAZIL TRADE REPORT: 2024-2025 ================================================================================ OVERVIEW: Trade between Canada and Brazil reached $14,470,332,741 in 2025, representing a +16.0% change from 2024 ($12,476,738,128). KEY DRIVERS: • Primary growth engine: Ontario (68.8% of total growth) • Leading product category: Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations (+212.2%) • Market concentration: Top 10 provinces drive 80% of growth OUTLOOK: • 6-month forecast: +2.2% growth expected • Projected 6-month total: $7,641,817,188 • Confidence level: HIGH (R²=0.960, MAPE=2.5%) STRATEGIC IMPERATIVE: Focus resources on Ontario and Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations to maximize impact, as these two areas combined represent the majority of growth opportunity.

6. Strategic Recommendations

Focus on High-Growth Regions

  • Prioritize Ontario (68.8% of growth)
  • Increase trade missions to this region
  • Consider dedicated trade representation

Capitalize on Product Momentum

  • Develop Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations sector marketing
  • Organize buyer missions
  • Explore value-added opportunities

Address Underperforming Areas

  • Investigate Yukon decline
  • Conduct stakeholder interviews
  • Consider targeted incentives

Prepare for Projected Growth

  • Plan for 2.2% increase
  • Optimize supply chains
  • Monitor seasonal patterns
